mapper.sql: select p.period_id, p.dept_id, p.period_no, p.start_time, p.end_time, p.status, p.break_even_time, p.carry_forward_time, p.total_verified_expense, p.total_purchase, p.total_sale_payment, p.total_sale_amount, p.total_unverified_advance, p.net_profit, p.manager_profit_rate, p.manager_profit_amount, p.investor_profit_amount, p.del_flag, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, p.remark from fin_accounting_period p
mapper.select: where dept_id=#{deptId} and status='0' and del_flag='0' order by start_time desc limit 1
where dept_id=#{deptId} and status='2' and del_flag='0' order by carry_forward_time desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into fin_accounting_period(dept_id, period_no, start_time, end_time, status, break_even_time, carry_forward_time, total_verified_expense, total_purchase, total_sale_payment, total_sale_amount, total_unverified_advance, net_profit, manager_profit_rate, manager_profit_amount, investor_profit_amount, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{deptId}, #{periodNo}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status}, #{breakEvenTime}, #{carryForwardTime}, #{totalVerifiedExpense}, #{totalPurchase}, #{totalSalePayment}, #{totalSaleAmount}, #{totalUnverifiedAdvance}, #{netProfit}, #{managerProfitRate}, #{managerProfitAmount}, #{investorProfitAmount}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update: update fin_accounting_period set status='0', carry_forward_time=null, total_sale_amount=0, manager_profit_rate=0, manager_profit_amount=0, investor_profit_amount=0, update_by=#{updateBy}, update_time=sysdate() where period_id=#{periodId} and del_flag='0'
mapper.delete: update fin_accounting_period set del_flag='2' where period_id=#{periodId}
update fin_accounting_period set del_flag='2' where period_id in #{periodId}
